SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGITAL PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL SERVED APR-19-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT K2 SYSTEMS GROUP CORP.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-28-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-27-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT RE BANKRUPTCY. THE MAY-11-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-13-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT RE: BANKRUPTCY. THE DEC-28-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGITAL PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL SERVED DEC-18-2007, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT K2 SYSTEMS GROUP CORP.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGITAL PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-15-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. THE FEB-13-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF ORDER SETTING CASE MGMT CONFERENCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIGITAL PRE-PRESS INTERNATIONAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT RE BANKRUPTCY STATUS. THE OCT-10-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
